sprite::rewrite< CTOR > Struct Template Reference

Detailed Description

template<>
struct sprite::rewrite< CTOR >

Rewrites a node to a CTOR node.

The tag member holds the static constructor identifier, which is a value greater than or equal to CTOR. The tag is set to that. The id is set to the dynamic constructor identifer (which is assigned at program load time).

Definition at line 60 of file rewrite.hpp.

Note:
This function _claims_ ownership of the pointer and will delete it with delete[].
